name: S-13 freshness gate --no-network falls back to offline-cached status when a cache file exists per §2.17
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache && printf '2026-05-20T08:00:00Z' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/src.txt && printf 'cached html' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache/src.html && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --source-id src --fetch-frequency daily --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --no-network --emit-status s.json && grep -q 'offline-cached' s.json && echo cached 1>&2
